preparation_method.heading: How to prepare the perfect puttu

steps.label: Season
steps.title: Add salt to the flour
steps.description: Take the puttu flour in a wide bowl. Add salt as needed and mix with your fingers.

steps.label: Sprinkle
steps.title: Add water little by little
steps.description: Sprinkle cool water in stages, mixing constantly. Never pour — too much water collapses the texture.

steps.label: Check
steps.title: Test the crumbly texture
steps.description: Press a handful: it should hold its shape, then crumble easily when you tap. That's the right moisture.

steps.label: Layer base
steps.title: Coconut at the bottom
steps.description: Add a layer of grated coconut at the bottom of the puttu maker. This becomes the sweet, fragrant first bite.

steps.label: Build
steps.title: Alternate flour & coconut
steps.description: Add a layer of prepared flour, then coconut, then flour again. Repeat until the puttu maker is full.

steps.label: Steam & serve
steps.title: 5–7 minutes — hot from the cooker
steps.description: Attach to the cooker and steam 5–7 minutes. Slide out, serve hot with banana & jaggery, or kadala curry.

preparation_method.heading: How to prepare the perfect puttu

steps.label: Season
steps.title: Add salt to the flour
steps.description: Take the puttu flour in a wide bowl. Add salt as needed and mix with your fingers.

steps.label: Sprinkle
steps.title: Add water little by little
steps.description: Sprinkle cool water in stages, mixing constantly. Never pour — too much water collapses the texture.

steps.label: Check
steps.title: Test the crumbly texture
steps.description: Press a handful: it should hold its shape, then crumble easily when you tap. That's the right moisture.

steps.label: Layer base
steps.title: Coconut at the bottom
steps.description: Add a layer of grated coconut at the bottom of the puttu maker. This becomes the sweet, fragrant first bite.

steps.label: Build
steps.title: Alternate flour & coconut
steps.description: Add a layer of prepared flour, then coconut, then flour again. Repeat until the puttu maker is full.

steps.label: Steam & serve
steps.title: 5–7 minutes — hot from the cooker
steps.description: Attach to the cooker and steam 5–7 minutes. Slide out, serve hot with banana & jaggery, or kadala curry.
